column1: Bo Bichette headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a scorching 73.5% hit probability, batting second on the road and set up for success against lefty Matthew Liberatore in a hitter-friendly park. George Springer isn’t far behind, leading off at home with a strong matchup versus Kyle Freeland and the platoon edge working in his favor—expect his steady bat to keep the line moving. Nico Hoerner and Trea Turner round out the list with reliable top-of-order roles and favorable splits, making them solid fallback options for streak chasers seeking consistency.
